task_completion.description: Open the DICOM viewer and load the oncology CT study.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A DICOM viewer application (e.g., Weasis) is open and displaying a medical image from the /home/ga/DICOM/studies/oncology_ct/ directory.

task_completion.description: Apply the specified soft tissue windowing settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The DICOM viewer UI shows windowing settings explicitly set to Window Width (WW) 400 and Window Level (WL) 50.

task_completion.description: Identify and measure the first target lesion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line measurement tool is drawn across a structure on the medical image, displaying a length measurement in millimeters (mm).

task_completion.description: Identify and measure a second distinct target lesion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second line measurement tool is drawn across a different structure or on a different image slice, displaying a length measurement in millimeters (mm).

task_completion.description: Export the CT slices showing the measurements as PNG files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file explorer, or terminal showing the creation or existence of 'recist_lesion1.png' and 'recist_lesion2.png' in the /home/ga/DICOM/exports/ directory.

task_completion.description: Write the RECIST assessment report with all required details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing 'recist_report.txt' containing anatomical locations, individual diameters in mm, the Sum of Longest Diameters (SLD), and a baseline assessment statement.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a graphical DICOM viewer to view and measure the images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show a genuine DICOM viewer GUI (like Weasis) being interacted with, rather than just terminal commands or scripts processing the DICOM files blindly.

integrity.description: Verify the measurements in the report match the visual measurements taken in the viewer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The millimeter values written in 'recist_report.txt' should correspond to the numbers visible on the measurement lines drawn in the DICOM viewer.

integrity.description: Verify the exported images contain the measurement annotations.
integrity.visual_evidence: The exported PNG files or the viewer's export preview should clearly show the drawn measurement lines, proving they are screenshots/exports of the measured state, not just raw extracted DICOM frames.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must act as a Radiologist applying RECIST 1.1. The study is located in oncology_ct (using an XA sample proxy). The agent must explicitly set the viewer to Window Width 400 and Window Level 50. At least 2 distinct lesions must be measured. The final report must include anatomical locations, individual diameters in mm, the Sum of Longest Diameters (SLD), and a baseline assessment statement.
